$comment: Alba v3 — reconciled design system. Source of truth = SHIPPED (app/globals.css + the approved staging-layout-v75 mock). Structure inherited from the v2 GPT design-system files; every value conflict resolved in favor of what is live in production. See README.md for the full reconciliation rationale. v2/ is preserved untouched as the original concept.

brand.name: Alba
brand.tagline: Clarity at dawn. Productivity all day.
brand.description: A calm, intelligent AI assistant suite that helps organize, create, and accomplish with clarity.

$typeNote: Shipped uses a compact UI scale, overriding the GPT spec's larger marketing sizes. Values below are the actual sizes from staging-layout-v75.

colors.$note: Authoritative = app/globals.css. light + dark are 1:1 with the live CSS custom properties.

semantic.$note: Functional UI colors taken from the approved staging-layout-v75 mock. Shipped's success green (#4CB783) wins over the GPT spec's #35A66F.

products.$note: Per-skill accent system for the Alba suite (used by the app-auth skills selector). Docs is reconciled to the SHIPPED accent; the others remain GPT placeholders until those skills ship and get tuned.

radii.$note: Scale derived from actual shipped usage, overriding the GPT 6/10/16/24/32 scale. Tailwind v4 named radii resolve to 0px here, so these ship as explicit px (see DECISIONS.md 2026-06-16).

shadows.$note: Shipped's tighter elevation, overriding the GPT soft-shadow spec.

spacing.$note: Common inset/gap steps observed in shipped components (px). Not yet enforced as tokens in code.
